_notes.db_selector: /run cas -> db.default ('demo' = cas_demo.db). /run cas cas -> cas.db. /run cas ric -> ric.db. The db-key is the 2nd positional arg to /run; it maps to db.instances.<key>.file. The dev server picks the DB by /run pre-setting env_var (SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI) before launch -- flask_app.py's load_dotenv(override=False) lets the pre-set env win over .env.
_notes.reset_rule: reset-database may wipe ONLY an instance with resettable:true AND whose file matches *_demo.db (user rule 2026-07-04: ric.db is LIVE). Today only 'demo' (cas_demo.db) qualifies. cas.db/ric.db/cas_pitch.db are never resettable.
_notes.cas_demo_missing: cas_demo.db does NOT exist yet. It was renamed cas_demo.db -> cas.db on 2026-07-03. So /run cas (default demo) has no DB to open until we seed cas_demo.db (via seed_cmd) -- decide at the /reset-database + /run wiring step whether to seed a fresh cas_demo.db or copy cas.db to cas_demo.db.
_notes.live_dbs: ric.db = real RIC client data (WARN + confirm before /run opens it). cas_pitch.db = pitch snapshot.
_notes.python: CAS has a venv with pytest + pytest-xdist. zhiyuan has none (PATH python).
